title: sticherus squamulosus var. gunckelianus
intro: Sticherus squamulosus var. gunckelianus, also known as Gunckel's forked fern or forked sticherus, is a variety of fern that belongs to the family Gleicheniaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Sticherus squamulosus var. gunckelianus can be made by drying the leaves and stems, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
